The '''Mawan''' were a species of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mawan/Legends|Mawan]]. They had pale skin, two hearts, and blue blood vessels close to the surface of the skin. It was considered a mark of refinement for a Mawan's veins to show through the skin.

The Mawan gesture of friendship and welcome was to give a brief nod, then to hold out the hand, palm out, while offering a verbal salutation or greeting.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]'' {{1st}}
